def build_processor(dataset_path):
    with open(dataset_path, "rb") as f:
        huge_dataset = f.read()

    records = parse_records(huge_dataset)
    index = {r["id"]: r for r in records}
    del huge_dataset
    del records

    def process(item_id):
        return index.get(item_id)

    return process


def create_validator(schema_path):
    with open(schema_path) as f:
        schema_data = f.read()

    compiled_schema = compile_schema(schema_data)
    refs = frozenset(extract_references(compiled_schema))

    def validate(payload):
        return check(payload, compiled_schema, refs)

    return validate


class Filter:
    def __init__(self, config_path):
        with open(config_path) as f:
            raw_config = f.read()
        parsed = parse_config(raw_config)
        self._index = build_index(parsed)

    def __call__(self, item):
        return match(item, self._index)
